name: @bitclaw/loadtest
description: Load testing framework for SQLite-backed web applications

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && chmod +x dist/cli.js && npm run test
scripts.publish:dev: npm run build && npm publish --tag dev --access public
scripts.publish:patch: npm whoami && npm version patch && git push --follow-tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:minor: npm whoami && npm version minor && git push --follow-tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:major: npm whoami && npm version major && git push --follow-tags && npm publish --access public

author: bitclaw
